scripts.init-admin: npm run init-db && npm run generate-admin-sql && echo 'Executing SQL:' && cat scripts/createAdminUser.sql && wrangler d1 execute tgpan --file=./scripts/createAdminUser.sql --remote
scripts.print-db: wrangler d1 execute tgpan --command="SELECT * FROM files; SELECT * FROM users;" --remote --json | jq
scripts.print-remote-db: wrangler d1 execute tgpan --command="SELECT * FROM files; SELECT * FROM users;" --remote --json | node scripts/formatDbOutput.js
